error_signature: agent does not query the vector database
title: AI agent fails to query the vector database
symptom: The AI agent outputs irrelevant responses instead of querying the vector database. It does not utilize the knowledge base as expected.
applies_when: Using Supabase as the vector store
not_this_if: The issue is with a different node or configuration
root_cause: The AI agent may not be properly configured to interact with the Supabase vector store, or there may be compatibility issues with the specific model being used. This can lead to the agent generating responses without consulting the knowledge base.
fix_steps: Test the AI agent with a simplified prompt and only the knowledge base node.
If the issue persists, try using a different vector store like Pinecone.
Consider testing with a different AI model to see if it improves performance.
agent_instruction: Test the AI agent with a simplified setup and consider switching to Pinecone if issues continue.
